corrected_value.evidence: Downgraded from 'no'. The prior booking_probe evidence claimed the accepting bpl card was 'same MBLN network', but chelsea is MBLN while bpl is network=BPL — that card is cross-network, so its acceptance does not prove town-open. backup/cross_network_tests.json also shows a rejection, but with a cross-network NOBLE (reading) card, which only proves cross-network blocking, not town residency. No valid same-network evidence either way → unknown.
